title: Add Push and FetchAndRebase to git.Client
definition_of_done: Push and FetchAndRebase on *Client. Tests: fast-forward succeeds, rejected returns error, FetchAndRebase+Push succeeds after rejection.
outcome: Added Push(branch string) and FetchAndRebase(branch string) methods to git.Client. Tests: fast-forward push succeeds, rejected push returns error, FetchAndRebase+Push succeeds after rejection. All pass.
